items.definition_en: A checkpoint is a saved point in a game where you start again after losing.
items.example_en: After each big battle, the game sets a checkpoint.

items.definition_en: A spawn point is the place where a character starts or returns in a video game.
items.example_en: My avatar kept dying near the enemy spawn point.

items.definition_en: An expansion pack is extra content added to a video game.
items.example_en: The expansion pack offered new missions and characters.

items.definition_en: A cutscene is a short movie or scene in a video game.
items.example_en: The cutscene explained why the hero had to leave the city.

items.definition_en: A patch is an update to fix or improve a video game.
items.example_en: After the patch, the game stopped crashing.

items.definition_en: Inventory is all the items a player has collected in a game.
items.example_en: You should check your inventory before the boss fight.

items.definition_en: A tutorial is a part of a game that teaches you how to play.
items.example_en: The tutorial was very helpful for beginners.

items.definition_en: A game mode is a specific way to play a video game.
items.example_en: We tried the new survival game mode.

items.definition_en: A loot box is a virtual box containing random rewards in video games.
items.example_en: You can unlock costumes with a loot box.

items.definition_en: A mini-game is a short game inside another video game.
items.example_en: This mini-game lets you fish in the RPG world.

items.definition_en: Gameplay is how a video game is played and experienced.
items.example_en: The gameplay is fast and exciting.

items.definition_en: A non-player character is a character controlled by the game.
items.example_en: The non-player character gave us useful advice.

items.definition_en: A game developer is a person who creates video games.
items.example_en: The game developer announced a new update.

items.definition_en: In-game currency is the money used inside a video game.
items.example_en: She saved up her in-game currency to buy a new weapon.

items.definition_en: A tutorial level is the first stage that teaches the basic controls in a game.
items.example_en: The tutorial level is easy for new players.

items.definition_en: A game engine is the software that builds and runs a video game.
items.example_en: The new game engine makes graphics look better.

items.definition_en: A speedrun is a playthrough of a game as fast as possible.
items.example_en: He recorded a speedrun of the whole game in one hour.

items.definition_en: A walkthrough is a guide that shows how to finish a game.
items.example_en: I used a walkthrough to pass the difficult puzzle.

items.definition_en: A game tester is a person who checks video games for problems.
items.example_en: A game tester found several bugs before release.

items.definition_en: A soundtrack is all the music used in a video game.
items.example_en: The soundtrack made the game more exciting.
